mcp._comment: Default efficiency MCPs. RTK is the biggest win (60-90% on bash). Octocode + Caveman for semantic operations. Enable/disable per-agent in opencode.json.

filesystem._why: Bounded file access — safer than letting agent read anywhere

github._why: Issues, PRs, code search, repo metadata. Requires GITHUB_PAT env var.

context7._why: Live library docs — kills hallucinations on library APIs

codegraph._why: Code-aware search via graph index. 1-2 KB answers instead of 50 KB grep dumps

octocode._why: Semantic code indexer with GraphRAG. Natural language search over your codebase

gh-grep._why: Search public GitHub code by intent. Better than raw GitHub search for examples

agent-browser._why: Vercel Labs' fast browser automation CLI. Native Rust, snapshot+refs workflow. Replaces Playwright for AI agents.
